metadata.title: ServiGlobal · IA - Voice AI & Omnichannel Agents
metadata.description: We implement custom voice and omnichannel agents. We integrate telephony, messaging, CRM and calendars.

whyUs.title: Why trust us?
whyUs.subtitle: Experience, integration, and real support every step of the way.

voiceExperience.title: Solid voice experience
voiceExperience.subtitle: Proven operations.
voiceExperience.description: Proven track record implementing voice operations for businesses, call centers, and complex environments.

existingInfra.title: Your infrastructure, empowered
existingInfra.subtitle: Real integration.
existingInfra.description: We connect with your existing PBX, telephony, CRM, and calendars. No need to change what already works.

guidedImplementation.title: Guided implementation
guidedImplementation.subtitle: Not self-service.
guidedImplementation.description: Diagnosis, design, pilot, and production with our team. We don't disappear after launch.

clickToIACall.title: Click-to-IA-Call
clickToIACall.subtitle: Close deals faster.
clickToIACall.description: Your users fill out a quick form and the AI agent starts the call with full context to close in minutes.

customVoiceInfra.title: Voice infrastructure
customVoiceInfra.subtitle: Tailored for you.
customVoiceInfra.description: We configure or optimize your voice infrastructure for AI agents, or build it from scratch if needed.

continuousSupport.title: Ongoing support
continuousSupport.subtitle: Real partnership.
continuousSupport.description: Monitoring, adjustments, improvements, and constant optimization. Support that grows with you.

hero.descriptionFull: Capture data, understand intent, and execute actions: appointments, visits, tickets, payments, or payment promises.
hero.microcopySetup: Custom implementation (setup) + monthly operation + variable consumption by channels and volume.
hero.microcopySuperPlus: Activate Click-to-Servi-IA-Call: smart form → Servi-IA call with context → faster closing.

demoCommon.fillAllFields: Please complete all fields to continue.

painPoint.lostCalls: Many calls are lost due to lack of staff.
painPoint.repetitiveTasks: Human agents lose time on repetitive tasks.
painPoint.highCost: Call Center operating costs are too high.
painPoint.slowResponse: Response to new leads is too slow (they go cold).

useCases.title: Choose your use case
useCases.subtitle: Our Servi-IA agents adapt to your business model. Select your industry to see how we can help.

atencion.title: Customer Service
atencion.promise: Resolve queries 24/7 and reduce wait times.
tasks: Immediate availability on voice and messaging

soporte.title: Call Centers & Technical Support
soporte.promise: Reduce repetitive tickets and standardize your support.

cobranza.title: Collections & Payment Recovery
cobranza.promise: More payment promises, less operational friction.

ventas.title: Sales & Lead Generation
ventas.promise: Filter prospects and schedule meetings with qualified leads.

reclutamiento.title: Recruitment & Selection
reclutamiento.promise: Pre-filter candidates and schedule interviews without human intervention.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce & Online Stores
ecommerce.promise: Convert more with automated support and sales.

benefits.title: How can Servi-IA benefit you?
benefits.subtitle: Tangible results from the first month of implementation.

sales.title: Increase Sales
sales.desc: We filter and qualify prospects so your team only handles leads ready to buy.

service.title: 24/7 Service
service.desc: Constant availability in messaging and voice, with handoff to human when needed.

errors.title: Reduce Errors
errors.desc: Consistent and auditable flows: fewer human errors in repetitive tasks.

costs.title: Save Operating Costs
costs.desc: Automate volume without hiring more staff for routine work.

stack.title: Integrate Your Stack
stack.desc: Connect calendars, email, messaging, telephony and internal tools.

time.title: Record Time
time.desc: Guided implementation with clear deliverables: diagnosis → pilot → production.

superPlus.title: Faster Closing with Context
superPlus.desc: The call starts with form data, reducing repeat questions and accelerating scheduling, sales, or resolution.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.desc: Regulatory compliance (Banking, Health). Deploy on your infrastructure or private cloud for total control.

process.title: We don't sell a platform.
process.subtitle: We implement a system that fits your operation.
process.description: Custom implementation with setup based on scope: integrations, flows and channels. We offer Click-to-Servi-IA-Call to boost conversions with prior context.

phase1.title: Pre-consultation (Diagnosis)
phase1.description: We analyze your processes, volume, channels, integrations, risks and metrics.

phase2.title: Implementation (Pilot)
phase2.description: We build your Servi-IA, integrate channels (voice + messaging + CRM + calendars) and train flows.

phase3.title: Production & Optimization
phase3.description: Deployment, monitoring, adjustments, continuous improvements and constant support.

integrations.title: We connect with what you
integrations.description: No need to change your infrastructure. Our agents integrate natively with your existing operation.
integrations.description2: Human handoff is configurable to your operation: by call, by messaging, or no handoff at all.

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Mandatory setup (custom implementation) + monthly operation + variable consumption.

addon.name: Servi-IA Turbo
addon.description: Advanced Click-to-Servi-IA-Call for campaigns and complex funnels

pricing.consumptionNote: Consumption (minutes and messaging) varies by country and volume. Billed based on plan and actual usage.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions before the consultation.

replaceTeam.question: Does this replace my team?
replaceTeam.answer: No. It automates repetitive tasks and frees your team for higher-value work. Servi-IA escalates to human when needed.

changeOperation.question: Do I need to change my current operation?
changeOperation.answer: No. We integrate with your existing infrastructure (CRM, calendars, telephony, messaging). You don't need to replace anything.

voiceInfra.question: Do you configure my voice infrastructure?
voiceInfra.answer: Yes. If needed, we offer voice infrastructure setup and optimization as a custom service.

howLong.question: How long does implementation take?
howLong.answer: Depends on scope. After diagnosis, we deliver a functional pilot in record time. Each project is custom-built.

omnichannel.question: Does it work with messaging and calls?
omnichannel.answer: Yes. Servi-IA is omnichannel: voice (telephony), messaging, and web chat, integrated based on your operation.

handoffRequired.question: Is human handoff mandatory?
handoffRequired.answer: No. Human handoff is configurable: by call, by messaging, or no handoff. You define it based on your operation.

ownMetrics.question: Can I have my own metrics?
ownMetrics.answer: Yes. Metric exports, dashboard access, and periodic reports are available upon request.

whatIsClickToIA.question: What is Click-to-Servi-IA-Call?
whatIsClickToIA.answer: It's an experience where the user fills a quick form and connects with Servi-IA that already has the context to close faster.

whatIsCallback.question: What is 'Servi-IA calls you now'?
whatIsCallback.answer: It's the variant where the user leaves their number with consent and the system triggers a Servi-IA call with the form's context.

dataPrivacy.question: Do you handle sensitive data (Health, Banking, Gov) and strict regulations?
dataPrivacy.answer: Yes. For regulated sectors, we deploy the entire solution (including open-source LLMs) on your own on-premise infrastructure or private cloud, ensuring total data sovereignty and compliance.

booking.title: Schedule your diagnosis
booking.description: Book a diagnosis call (15–30 min). Receive an initial automation plan for your case.
booking.postSchedule: Have ready: current processes, CRM, channels, monthly volume.

voiceDemo.title: Try Click-to-Servi-IA-Call now
voiceDemo.subtitle: Try the funnel: form → Servi-IA call with context → close.
voiceDemo.disclaimer: This demo is an example. In the consultation we design your real flow with your rules and integrations.

demoInbound.callEndedDesc: That's how Click-to-Servi-IA-Call works. Ready to design your real flow?
demoInbound.selectAgentDesc: Fill the form and connect with Servi-IA with context.

demoOutbound.requestCompletedDesc: We received your data. Servi-IA will contact you with your form's context.
demoOutbound.weCallYouDesc: Leave your details, fill the form and Servi-IA calls you with context.
demoOutbound.name: Name
demoOutbound.submitDisclaimer: By submitting, you agree to be contacted. Your data will only be used for this interaction.
demoOutbound.agentDialing: Servi-IA will call you with your form's context.

footer.tagline: Servi-IA Agents that work while you rest.
